name: Gone Surfing Hawaii
tagline: Small-group Waikiki lessons with actual ocean safety training — they teach you to surf and to respect the water.
price: $$ — Group lesson ~$75, semi-private ~$120, private ~$180 (2 hrs, board and rash guard included)
parking: Meet at Kuhio Beach; park at Zoo lot or Kapiolani Park
bestTime: First morning session at 8 AM for best conditions; book 1–2 days ahead
talkStory: Gone Surfing Hawaii keeps groups small — max 3 students per instructor — which is rare in Waikiki where most operations cram 8-10 people per group. The instructors are all lifeguard-certified and spend the first 20 minutes on land teaching ocean safety, wave reading, and pop-up technique before you even touch water. They teach at both Canoes and Kuhio Beach Walls depending on conditions and student ability, and they're one of the few schools that will honestly tell beginners to skip a day if conditions aren't safe. Photo packages available so you get actual proof you stood up. Consistently rated 5 stars with thousands of reviews — the word-of-mouth reputation is earned.
